english: Om, salutations to Chandika. Markandeya said —
That which is most secret in the world, giving complete protection to men
roman: Yad guhyam paramam loke sarva raksha karam nrinam

hindi: यन्त्रं मन्त्रं तदा स्तोत्रं यत्तु देव्या उदाहृतम्।
english: The Yantra, Mantra and Stotram spoken by the Goddess herself
roman: Yantram Mantram tada stotram yattu devya udahritam

english: One should always read the Devi Kavach for the removal of all calamities
roman: Sarvo padrava shantyartham devya kavacham pathet sada

hindi: जय त्वं देवि चामुण्डे जय भूतापहारिणि।
english: Victory to you O Goddess Chamunda, victory to the remover of afflictions
roman: Jaya tvam Devi Chamunde jaya bhutapaharini

hindi: जय सर्वगते देवि कालरात्रि नमोऽस्तु ते॥
english: Victory to you O all-pervading Goddess, Kalaratri — salutations to you
roman: Jaya sarvagate Devi Kalaratri namostu te

hindi: प्राची रक्षतु माम् ऐन्द्री आग्नेय्यां अग्निदेवता।
english: May Aindri protect me in the East, Agni deity in the Southeast
roman: Prachi rakshatu mam Aindri Agneyam Agnidevataa

english: May Varahi protect me in the South, the sword-bearing one in the Southwest
